name_en: 👄FENDI New Mon Tresor Small Bucket Bag, Beige Canvas material, featuring a raised FF pattern embroidery with color-blocked stitching, matching leather trim. Lined with gold-finish hardware. One long and one short detachable shoulder strap, woven soft Nappa leather, can be worn over the shoulder or crossbody. Model: FD6112, Dimensions: 18*10*12cm
